indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused solo work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged use.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting may cause glare on computer screens.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused work, and there is no flat personal work surface or ergonomic seating available. The ambient lighting may also cause glare on computer screens, further reducing the suitability for solo computer work.
